title: Reading Comprehension: Technology and Attention
description: A passage argues that constant digital notifications fragment human attention and make sustained concentration harder, even when people feel productive.
options: Technology can reduce sustained attention by increasing interruptions
Digital tools have no effect on attention
correctOption: Technology can reduce sustained attention by increasing interruptions

title: Vocabulary: Obsolete
description: Choose the word closest in meaning to 'obsolete' as used in formal writing.

title: Grammar: Preposition Usage
description: Choose the correct preposition to complete the sentence: 'He was accused ___ stealing the documents.'

title: Para Jumbles: Sequence of Events
description: Arrange the sentences into a logically coherent paragraph: A. He opened the door. B. He heard a knock. C. He was reading a book. D. A stranger stood outside.

title: Tone of Passage
description: A passage critically examines how consumer culture creates unrealistic expectations and endless dissatisfaction. What is the likely tone of the passage?

title: Antonym: Scarce
description: Select the word that is opposite in meaning to 'scarce'.

title: Sentence Correction
description: Choose the grammatically correct version of the sentence: 'He don't know the answer.'

title: Logical Inference
description: Consider the statements: 'All cats are animals' and 'Some animals are wild.' Which conclusion is logically valid?

title: Idiom Meaning
description: What does the idiom 'break the ice' mean in everyday usage?
options: To start a conversation and ease discomfort
correctOption: To start a conversation and ease discomfort

title: Passage Summary
description: A passage discusses how remote work has improved flexibility but also increased the need for self-discipline and clear boundaries. Which summary best captures the idea?
options: Remote work solves every workplace problem
Remote work offers benefits but also requires stronger personal discipline
Flexibility is the only issue in modern jobs
People should avoid remote work entirely
correctOption: Remote work offers benefits but also requires stronger personal discipline

title: Linear Arrangement
description: Five people A, B, C, D and E are seated in a row. A is to the left of B. C is at the extreme right. D is between A and C. Who is in the middle?

title: Data Interpretation: Average Sales
description: A company's monthly sales for four months are 10, 20, 30 and 40 units respectively. What is the average monthly sales?

title: Circular Arrangement
description: Six friends are seated around a circle. A sits opposite B. C sits immediately to the right of A. Which person is adjacent to A on the other side?

title: Coding-Decoding
description: In a certain code, CAT is written as DBU. Using the same rule, how is DOG written?

title: Table Interpretation: Profit
description: A trader invests ₹100 and earns a profit of 20%. What is the total selling price?

title: Blood Relation
description: A is the father of B. B is the mother of C. How is A related to C?

title: Logic Puzzle: Wrong Labels
description: Three boxes are incorrectly labeled 'Apples', 'Oranges', and 'Mixed'. By opening only one box, how can you identify the correct labels?

title: Pie Chart Interpretation
description: A sector in a pie chart represents 25% of the total 200 units. What is the value represented by that sector?

title: Direction Sense
description: A person starts facing North, turns right, then turns right again. Which direction is he facing now?

title: Arrangement Puzzle
description: Four people are seated in a row. P is not at either end. Q is to the left of P. R is to the right of P. Who must be at one of the ends?

title: Percentage Calculation
description: What is 20% of 150?

title: Simple Interest
description: Find the simple interest on ₹2000 at 5% per annum for 3 years.

title: Train Problem
description: A train 150 meters long passes a pole in 10 seconds. What is its speed in km/h?

title: Time and Work
description: A can complete a work in 10 days and B can complete the same work in 20 days. If they work together, how long will they take?

title: Average
description: What is the average of the numbers 10, 20 and 30?

title: Profit and Loss
description: A shopkeeper buys an article for ₹800 and sells it for ₹920. What is the profit percentage?

title: Ratio and Proportion
description: If 2:3 = x:15, what is the value of x?

title: LCM
description: What is the least common multiple of 12 and 18?

title: Speed Calculation
description: A car covers a distance of 60 km in 2 hours. What is its average speed?

title: Number Series
description: Find the next number in the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, ?
